name: [GRIDHAND] Payment Chaser Agent - Invoice overdue 1 day → polite SMS reminder

gridhand.scenario: Invoice overdue 1 day → polite SMS reminder
gridhand.description: When an invoice becomes one day overdue, GRIDHAND automatically triggers a workflow that sends a polite SMS reminder to the customer through the business's existing messaging app, such as Twilio, at 10am to gently nudge them about the pending payment. This reminder is personalized with the customer's name and invoice details, and is designed to be friendly yet clear about the need for prompt payment. By automating this process, the business owner can reduce the time spent on following up with late payments and improve cash flow, with GRIDHAND tracking the response and updating the invoice status accordingly.
